fixtures.source: Packet-derived synthetic activity-candidate windows built from a historical HR marker and a raw-motion packet summary.
fixtures.notes: One HR-only window and one motion-only window exercise packet-derived provenance, readiness, and blocker reporting without promoting either window to candidate state.

fixtures.source: Hand-derived synthetic activity-session fixture covering unknown, run-like, ride-like, strength-like, HR-only/no-distance, no-HR, and multi-interval cases.
fixtures.notes: Seven synthetic activity sessions cover the generic pre-device corpus without WHOOP bytes. The file keeps provenance, sync status, metrics, intervals, and labels aligned with the activity storage tables.

fixtures.source: Hand-derived debug bridge stream contract fixture for local WebSocket validation.

fixtures.source: Hand-derived parity fixture from the existing Python dry-run command builder.

fixtures.source: Hand-derived Goose v5 historical data frame using APK so0.b stable header offsets.
fixtures.notes: HISTORICAL_DATA K18 frame with stable header fields and HR-present marker at payload offset 14.

fixtures.source: Hand-derived synthetic exported command-validation rows for Gen5 historical-sync dry-run coverage.
fixtures.notes: Covers the optional GetDataRange row, the SendHistoricalData and HistoryEnd acknowledgement rows, and an AbortHistoricalTransmits row for retry and cancel-path dry-run coverage.

fixtures.source: Hand-derived shortened Goose v5 K10 raw-motion frame using APK uo0.a offsets.
fixtures.notes: Short K10 fixture validates heart-rate byte, signed accelerometer preview stats, truncation warnings, and raw body preservation without pretending motion units are known.

fixtures.source: Hand-derived Goose v5 K16 WHOOP MG raw ECG/Labrador frame using the same APK qh0.i offsets as R17.
fixtures.notes: K16 raw ECG/Labrador packet fixture for WHOOP MG. Validates offset-level flags, channels/gain bytes, signed sample stats, and raw body preservation.

fixtures.source: Hand-derived shortened Goose v5 K21 grouped-motion frame using APK uo0.e offsets.
fixtures.notes: Short K21 fixture validates group counts, first signed axis stats, truncation warnings, and raw body preservation without pretending motion units are known.

fixtures.source: Hand-derived Goose v5 R17 data-packet frame using APK qh0.i field offsets.

fixtures.source: Hand-derived Goose v5 event frame using APK event header offsets.

fixtures.source: Hand-derived HealthKit dry-run fixture for mapping and HRV guard tests.

fixtures.source: Hand-derived HRV fixture for Goose HRV v0 calculation tests.
fixtures.notes: RR intervals produce mean NN 800 ms, RMSSD sqrt(200), sample SDNN sqrt(200/3), pNN50 0.

fixtures.source: Hand-derived OpenWhoop-inspired activity dry-run comparison fixture from Goose's current planner and the OpenWhoop reference commit 55c5c1e2e02d3822c33e258838a57bb7d9e2ca53.
fixtures.notes: Covers planned activity-session labels, destination activity mappings, and attached metric/interval counts for OpenWhoop-inspired dry-run comparison. Strain comparison remains covered by the existing strain reference tests. The referenced OpenWhoop snapshot did not include a license file at the cited commit; use it as reverse-engineering prior art only.

fixtures.notes: Exercises the marker normalizer so HistoryStart, HistoryEnd, and HistoryComplete are recovered from mixed-case metadata names. The referenced OpenWhoop snapshot did not include a license file at the cited commit; use it as reverse-engineering prior art only.
